warnings: Article density-averaged benchmark used 4 uniform Al states across 3.75-4.50 g/cm^3 at Te=0.600 eV. || Benchmark spectral mode uses a refined odd energy grid (>= 4001 points) and local quadratic peak extraction; advanced invalid states remain hard failures instead of fallbacks. || Plasmon electron policy 'Valence-locked benchmark' is active: Valence-locked benchmark active-subset materials: Al@elements.Al(cold_Zeff=3.000, mode=cold_baseline_only) -> baseline 3.000 + increment 0.000 = 3.000; unresolved [none]; raw-kept [none]. This mode is intended for literature-facing benchmark comparisons, not as a blind replacement for raw hydro ionization. || The selected non-LFC spectral branch ignores the requested static-LFC backend setting (esa_static). Choose a dedicated static-LFC plasmon model if you want correlation corrections applied. || Theta = Te/Ef < 1, so the selected state is at least partially degenerate; the current spectral branch still uses the classical finite-temperature susceptibility baseline and should be treated as approximate in degenerate WDM conditions.
